Constructs an empty ε-box dominance archive using the specified ε-box dominance comparator.

Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values and initialized with the specified solutions.
EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator - Class in org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Compares two solutions using aggregate constraint violations and the additive ε-box objective comparator.
EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator(double) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.core.comparator.EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator
Constructs a dominance comparator for comparing solutions first using the AggregateConstraintComparator followed by the EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator with the specified ε value.
EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator(double[]) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.core.comparator.EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator
Constructs a dominance comparator for comparing solutions first using the AggregateConstraintComparator followed by the EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator with the specified ε values.

Constructs a dominance comparator for comparing solutions first using the AggregateConstraintComparator followed by the EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator with the specified ε values.

KruskalWallisTest - Class in org.moeaframework.util.statistics
The Kruskal-Wallis One-Way Analysis of Variance by Ranks is a non-parametric statistical test determining if (at least) two out of K >= 2 populations have differing medians.

A population that maintains the property of pair-wise non-dominance between all solutions.

Utility for auto-completion, finding the closest matching unique option from a set of options.

Constructs a new, empty option auto-completer.

OptionCompleter(Collection<String>) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.util.OptionCompleter
Constructs a new option auto-completer initialized to recognize the specified options.
or(AttachPoint) - Method in class org.moeaframework.analysis.collector.AttachPoint
Returns an attach point which performs the logical OR between two attach points, matching an object if either or both of the attach points match the object.
Or - Class in org.moeaframework.util.tree
The node for calculating the logical OR of two boolean values.
Or() - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.util.tree.Or

OrdinalStatisticalTest - Class in org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Abstract class for implementing ordinal (rank-based) statistical tests.
OrdinalStatisticalTest(int) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.util.statistics.OrdinalStatisticalTest
Constructs a new ordinal (rank-based) statistical test for the specified number of groups.
OrdinalStatisticalTest(int, Comparator<RankedObservation>) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.util.statistics.OrdinalStatisticalTest
Constructs a new ordinal (rank-based) statistical test for the specified number of groups and the comparator for ordering observations.
org.moeaframework - package org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm - package org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation - package org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension - package org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso - package org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa - package org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single - package org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis - package org.moeaframework.analysis
Tools for analyzing the runtime and end-of-run behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector - package org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics - package org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
Diagnostic tool for analyzing the runtime behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.io - package org.moeaframework.analysis.io
File formats used by the MOEA Framework analysis codes.
org.moeaframework.analysis.plot - package org.moeaframework.analysis.plot
Basic 2D plotting support.
org.moeaframework.analysis.tools - package org.moeaframework.analysis.tools
Command line tools for evaluating MOEAs and analyzing results.
org.moeaframework.builder - package org.moeaframework.builder
Command line tools for generating the scaffolding for native problems from template files.
org.moeaframework.core - package org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.attribute - package org.moeaframework.core.attribute
Convenience methods for reading and writing attributes.
org.moeaframework.core.comparator - package org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Contains dominance comparators and other comparators used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.configuration - package org.moeaframework.core.configuration
Support for configuring algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness - package org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator - package org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.initialization - package org.moeaframework.core.initialization
Package of various initialization operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator - package org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary
Collection of operators for binary-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar
Collection of operators for grammars for use with Grammatical Evolution (GE).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.permutation
Collection of operators for permutation variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.program - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.program
Collection of operators for expression trees for use with Genetic Programming (GP).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.real - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.real
Collection of operators for real-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset - package org.moeaframework.core.operator.subset
Collection of operators for subset variables.
org.moeaframework.core.penalty - package org.moeaframework.core.penalty
Collection of penalty functions.
org.moeaframework.core.selection - package org.moeaframework.core.selection
Package of various selection operators.
org.moeaframework.core.spi - package org.moeaframework.core.spi
Defines the service provider interfaces (SPIs) and factories for constructing problems, algorithms and operators.
org.moeaframework.core.termination - package org.moeaframework.core.termination
Defines conditions for terminating runs.
org.moeaframework.core.variable - package org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.
org.moeaframework.parallel - package org.moeaframework.parallel
Support for distributed and parallel computing for optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island - package org.moeaframework.parallel.island
Implementation of the island model parallelization strategy.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island.executor - package org.moeaframework.parallel.island.executor
Executes an island model in some environment.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island.migration - package org.moeaframework.parallel.island.migration
Implementations of island model migration strategies.
org.moeaframework.parallel.island.topology - package org.moeaframework.parallel.island.topology
Implementations of island model topologies.
org.moeaframework.parallel.util - package org.moeaframework.parallel.util
Utilities for building parallel algorithms, including thread-safe versions of some classes.
org.moeaframework.problem - package org.moeaframework.problem
Package containing standardized problems and utility classes for working with problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016 - package org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Package containing the BBOB 2016 bi-objective test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CDTLZ - package org.moeaframework.problem.CDTLZ
Package for the constrained DTLZ test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CEC2009 - package org.moeaframework.problem.CEC2009
Test problems used for the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
org.moeaframework.problem.DTLZ - package org.moeaframework.problem.DTLZ
Package for the scalable DTLZ test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP - package org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP
Package for the scalable LSMOP test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LZ - package org.moeaframework.problem.LZ
Package for the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
org.moeaframework.problem.MaF - package org.moeaframework.problem.MaF
The MaF test problem suite for many-objective optimization.
org.moeaframework.problem.misc - package org.moeaframework.problem.misc
Collection of unconstrained and constrained numeric multiobjective test problems aggregated by Van Veldhuizen [1].
org.moeaframework.problem.single - package org.moeaframework.problem.single
Collection of single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.problem.WFG - package org.moeaframework.problem.WFG
Implementation of the Walking Fish Group (WFG) test suite of scalable multiobjective problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZCAT - package org.moeaframework.problem.ZCAT
Package for the scalable ZCAT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZDT - package org.moeaframework.problem.ZDT
Package for the ZDT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.util - package org.moeaframework.util
Collection of general-purpose utilities.
org.moeaframework.util.clustering - package org.moeaframework.util.clustering
Support for clustering of solutions, either using their decision variables (if numeric) or objective values.
org.moeaframework.util.distributed - package org.moeaframework.util.distributed
Classes to enable distributed computing.
org.moeaframework.util.format - package org.moeaframework.util.format
Classes for formatting data into a tabular format.
org.moeaframework.util.grammar - package org.moeaframework.util.grammar
Utilities for representing, parsing and building grammars for use in Grammatical Evolution (GE).
org.moeaframework.util.io - package org.moeaframework.util.io
Collection of I/O utility classes.
org.moeaframework.util.progress - package org.moeaframework.util.progress
Collection of classes for managing progress reporting, including providing listeners for receiving progress updates and estimating remaining time.
org.moeaframework.util.sequence - package org.moeaframework.util.sequence
Classes for generating sequences of real numbers.
org.moeaframework.util.statistics - package org.moeaframework.util.statistics
Collection of statistical methods for determining certain properties of collected samples.
org.moeaframework.util.tree - package org.moeaframework.util.tree
Classes for representing, building and evaluating expression trees for use in Genetic Programming (GP).
org.moeaframework.util.validate - package org.moeaframework.util.validate
Methods for validating inputs, arguments, and properties.
org.moeaframework.util.weights - package org.moeaframework.util.weights
Routines for generating weights for decomposition and reference point methods.

Transformation that oscillates the objective values of the inner function.

Constructs a new instance of the oscillation transformation.

Constructs a new instance of the penalty transformation.

Transformation that raises the objective value to the power of a given exponent.

Constructs a new instance of the power transformation.

Transformation that offsets the value of the objective by a fixed amount.
TransformObjectiveShift(BBOBFunction, double) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformObjectiveShift
Constructs a new instance of the shift objective transformation.
TransformVariablesAffine - Class in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016

Constructs a new instance of the affine transformation.
TransformVariablesAsymmetric - Class in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Transformation used to convert a symmetric to an asymmetric decision space.
TransformVariablesAsymmetric(BBOBFunction, double) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesAsymmetric
Constructs a new instance of the asymmetric transformation.
TransformVariablesBrs - Class in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Transformation that skews or scales the decision variables using the same method described by the Buche-Rastrigin function.
TransformVariablesBrs(BBOBFunction) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesBrs
Constructs a new instance of the Buche-Rastrigin scaling transformation.

Transformation that alters the condition number of the function.
TransformVariablesConditioning(BBOBFunction, double) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesConditioning
Constructs a new instance of the conditioning transformation.
TransformVariablesOscillate - Class in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Transformation that applies a monotone oscillation to the decision variables of the inner function.
TransformVariablesOscillate(BBOBFunction) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesOscillate
Constructs a new transformation that applies an oscillation to the decision variables.
TransformVariablesScale - Class in org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.
TransformVariablesScale(BBOBFunction, double) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesScale
Constructs a new transformation that scales the decision variables by a given factor.

Transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.
TransformVariablesShift(BBOBFunction, double[]) - Constructor for class org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016.TransformVariablesShift
Constructs a transformation that shifts all decision variables by a given offset.

Constructs a new instance of the x-hat transformation.

UNSGAIII - Class in org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementation of the "unified" NSGA-III, or U-NSGA-III, which improves selection pressure by replacing the random selection of NSGA-III with tournament selection.

Creates a new U-NSGA-III instance with the given number of reference point divisions.
